zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Stafford於1446年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham44歲，母親Anne Neville37歲。她於1462年與Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年在英國素瑞令費爾德享年26歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞令費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Stafford于1446年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham44岁，母亲Anne Neville37岁。她于1462年与Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年在英国素瑞令費爾德享年26岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞令費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Stafford was born in 1446, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, was 44 and her mother, Anne Neville, was 37. She married Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham in 1462. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1472, in Lingfield, Surrey, England, at the age of 26, and was buried in Lingfield, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Stafford est née en 1446, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Anne Neville, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham en 1462. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1472, à Lingfield, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Lingfield, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, Uni: Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Stafford 1446 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham 44 und ihre Mutter Anne Neville 37. Sie hat 1462 Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1472 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Lingfield, Surrey, England und wurde in Lingfield, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stafford è nata il nel 1446 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Anne Neville, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham nel 1462. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1472, nel Lingfield, Surrey, England, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Lingfield, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Staffordが1446年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckinghamは44歳，母Anne Nevilleは37歳であった。1462年にSir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年にイギリススリーリングフィールドで26歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Stafford(이)가 1446년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Neville(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1462년 Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 수리 링필드에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stafford nasceu em 1446, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Anne Neville, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham em 1462. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1472, em Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, Uni: Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Stafford родилась в 1446 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Neville, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham в 1462 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1472 г. в местности лингфиелд, сурри, Англия в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности лингфиелд, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en 1472, en Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultada en Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
